titles.en: Reward of feeding four Muslims to satiation
Reward of feeding four Muslims to satiation

segments: حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ فُضَیْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَشْبَعَ أَرْبَعَهً مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِینَ تَعْدِلُ مُحَرَّرَهً مِنْ وُلْدِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ ع.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ فُضَیْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَشْبَعَ أَرْبَعَهً مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِینَ تَعْدِلُ مُحَرَّرَهً مِنْ وُلْدِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ ع.

segments: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Aban b. Uthman from Fudhayl b. Yasar from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who satisfies the hunger of four Muslims, Allah will grant him the reward of freeing a slave from the progeny of Ismail (a.s.).”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Aban b. Uthman from Fudhayl b. Yasar from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who satisfies the hunger of four Muslims, Allah will grant him the reward of freeing a slave from the progeny of Ismail (a.s.).”
